item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: James Baldwin on why race shan't be removed from the conversation
item.description: Thanks for the appreciation everyone. Structural racism is an implicit form of racism, meaning we can be part of without realizing the associated attitudes are part of racist constructs. Race is a social construct, a social constant, a social fact. Being a social construct does not mean it does not exist. We FEEL it every day. The attitude of not seeing race or color is outdated and complicit to color blind universalism, a covert form of racism. Thanks to everyone seeing these applications of (social) science that make up the world we live in.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Explained
item.dc:creator: 5ywjdPumpkinPrincess

item.title: Don't screw up, don't screw up, don't screw up
item.description:
After about 5-6 years, I'm coming up on the end of the LitRPG, SciFi/Fantasy story I've been writing. It's been a lot of work, worry, and more work, but I'm almost there. I just have to not screw it up.
Things have gone much better than I hoped! I never thought I'd have made it this far, but thanks to some very kind people online (including a lot of imgurians), my series has found an audience.
I'm not gonna lie, this has all been very difficult. Tons of self-doubt, watching people younger than me do better than me in a shorter amount of time, worrying that I'm not making enough money to justify the time I spend writing... it's tough. I only started because my wife sent me an imgur post of another indie author on their way. So if you're an author, artist, or whatever else, and you're looking for a sign to put yourself out there, then hey, this is it. This post ( https://imgur.com/gallery/as-author-its-hard-telling-other-people-about-work-hvE3uXC ) also convinced me to just go for it. I like my work, and I now know that others like it too. I don't advertise myself much (I mostly post cursed image albums), but it's part of the job. It never gets easy, and I'm always nervous, but it does get less difficult.
If you've made it all the way down here and read my spiel, thanks. These are my books. I've got one more to go, and God willing, I won't fumble it. My cover artist is Enzo Fernandez aka pkblitz on most social media sites. All his work and my own are 100% human generated. Fuck AI slop. Currently, the books are on sale here: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BCQKXVVL If you'd like to follow me, I'm online at the following places: BlueSky (meme shitposting and photos of my dogs): https://bsky.app/profile/jjackerknecht.com TikTok (I just started one at the behest of an author friend telling me to get off my ass and just do it already): https://www.tiktok.com/@jjackerknecht Personal Website (Gonna try to update the blog more): https://www.jjackerknecht.com/
Dog and donkey tax. Thanks for all the support thus far, imgur.
item.dc:creator: EmperorJustin

item.title: Feline agility!
item.description: HEADSHOT! EDIT: Friday Frontpage once more! Thanks a lot, Imgurians! I do reviews as a hobby, this week I analyzed "Breakfast of Champions" by Kurt Vonnegut! And this time I had the guest appearance of Mr. Sunday! And a bit of a guest appearance by Miss Jellybean. You can watch the review here https://youtu.be/2B1Dwr29JXc
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: New Animal drop: Lowland Streaked Tenerec
item.description: The NGGYU says that this is the only mammal that can stridulate, as heard here. Looks like a shrew or hedgehog but actually most closely related to elephants and manatees.
item.dc:creator: GhostTater

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1644 (burrowing owlbum)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
It is. End of discussion.
Someone yesterday had a post that we needed more Burrowing Owls, so here's a group dropping their latest album.
GOAT of the kingdom of Quirigua, yo.
Yeaaaaaap.
As all of you have been baptized into shark, have put on shark, hallelujah.
I mean, same.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Thank you." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Dump of various things seen last night. Enjoy !
item.description:
My bruised forehead people need me.
Hang on tightly.
A very unfortunate design choice.
Everyday scenes in India. Probably not so stable or intoxicated person pelting stones at ongoing vehicles, hits a police car.
Seoul, Korea Street Food: Egg Toast Melt. They put corn in almost everything.
It’s so beautiful how children see the world.
The precision and sound of joinery.
The way she captures light is unreal.
Tool to create perfectly round spheres.
A Spirit airlines customer is demanding a refund after seeing this.
An act of kindness: priceless.
Rising gas prices.
This is a paper sculpture by Chinese artist Li Hongbo, and it is not carved from stone or clay. It is made from thousands of layers of glued paper, built using a structure inspired by traditional Chinese paper lanterns.
A teacher and his students built a 2 stage rocket from plastic bottles and powered by water pressure.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: The Government Confused Them On Purpose. Now It Wants The Money Back. Linda McMahon Is On The Case.
item.description: Linda McMahon — WWE executive, failed Senate candidate, current Education Secretary — just announced the government is getting back into collecting student loan payments. The same government spending $2 billion a day on an unauthorized war needs money back from a 24 year old nurse. ??? "We had a whole system of people not repaying their loans." Yes. Because during COVID the government said DON'T REPAY THEM. Then Biden offered forgiveness. Then courts blocked it. Then Trump cancelled the department overseeing it. And NOW they want the money. FROM THE PEOPLE THEY CONFUSED ON PURPOSE. ??? Jo from Jerz just said it perfectly: We're spending $2 billion a day on an illegal war, requesting $200 billion more from Congress, and the solution to the budget crisis is going after the single working mom who missed a couple of loan payments. THE ARITHMETIC IS NOT COMPLICATED. THE INTENTION IS. ??? Linda McMahon ran the WWE. She knows a rigged match when she sees one. She is currently IN one. Against college graduates. While Tomahawk missiles at $2.2 million each rain on Iranian shorelines. The student loan collector has entered the chat. God help the borrowers. ???? #StudentLoans #LindaMcMahon #EducationDepartment #2BillionADay #IranWar #PayYourLoans #NotYourWar #SingleWorkingMom #TheIntentionIsDeliberate #WWE
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @ArtJokerFan55 drew this adorable golden retriever! Check out their posts for more drawings and animation. Recommended by: @earthlingextraordinaire
27 Man Tax: Sebastian Stan
“My favorite thing about the Internet is that you get to go into the private world of real creeps without having to smell them.” - Penn Jillette So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: GovBrief Today #413
item.description: Alexia Moore took abortion pills and went to a Georgia emergency room in pain, where a security guard called the police. The fetus was delivered at the hospital and did not survive. The county coroner ruled the cause of death undetermined. The Georgia Bureau of Investigation declined to perform an autopsy. Local police charged Moore with felony murder anyway, building their case from her medical records and her own words to the nurses who treated her. She has been jailed for more than two weeks. Today, the Trump administration opened what it calls conscience investigations into all 13 states that require health insurers to cover abortion. That's the next step in a Project 2025 roadmap to eliminate that coverage by threatening to pull states' Medicaid funding. One woman in a rural county jail and 13 state governments are under federal investigation because they believe women have a fundamental right to make their own health care decisions. Call your representatives and demand they protect abortion access before the next woman arrives at an emergency room and leaves in handcuffs. We've emailed 6,600+ stories over 413 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260319-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-pearl-harbor [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar19 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/no-troops-iran [4] https://go.govbrief.today/abortion-insurance [5] https://go.govbrief.today/indyke-no-crime [6] https://go.govbrief.today/new-comey-subpoena [7] https://go.govbrief.today/gender-affirming-block [8] https://go.govbrief.today/ga-murder-charge [9] https://go.govbrief.today/teen-ice-death [10] https://go.govbrief.today/utah-ice-warehouse [11] https://go.govbrief.today/wisconsin-jail [12] https://go.govbrief.today/pastoral-access [13] https://go.govbrief.today/florez-released [14] https://go.govbrief.today/student-loans-treasury [15] https://go.govbrief.today/mullin-advances [16] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-gold-coin [17] https://go.govbrief.today/states-endangerment Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
